Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Go to Mitrilion.
  2. Defeat 20 the required hostiles.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock (PvP-7) A new weapon.

Quest Text

Description

Mitrillion has become infested with pirates looking to prove themselves. It's time to show your strength. Go there and ruin their attempts at so-called glory.

Kill 20 pirates in a row without getting your ship destroyed even once. If you can manage that we'll let you join our elite squad, the Silver Wing! As a member of this squad you'll be allowed access to some of our newly developed tech.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.
